factor_legend.C: screening (higher = human/founder read, less ATS filter)
factor_legend.D: spike (higher = genuine differentiated match to Ryan's spikes)
factor_legend.F: conversion (higher = realistic to convert if callback)

ranked.title: Founding Brand & Growth (Growth Generalist)
ranked.biggest_lever: Founding marketing hire read by founders, not ATS; role waives seniority + B2B requirements and prizes the builder-of-things profile Ryan has.
ranked.biggest_risk: Highest creative-taste bar (most consequential first marketing hire); 6 weeks open so a shortlist may exist.
ranked.apply_move: Show-don't-tell creative-led application: attach a built artifact (brand/landing/agent), not just metrics.
ranked.salary_flag: Not stated; $50M+ Series A London likely clears £50k.

ranked.title: Product Marketer - London
ranked.biggest_lever: JD literally describes Ryan's self-taught spike (Claude content engines, Cursor landing pages, high-agency creative generalist); founder-read.
ranked.biggest_risk: Audience is Finance/CFO B2B buyers; competition from marketers who already 'speak CFO'.
ranked.apply_move: Reframe Minima as an AI-native content/growth engine ($4.5m presale + content engine); attach a Claude/Cursor automation artifact.

ranked.title: Founder's Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Direct founder-inbox application; role spans product/sales/community/ops/research/hiring - near-identical to Ryan's actual Minima FA->Community->Marketing arc, in an adjacent VC/startup-data domain.
ranked.biggest_risk: 1-2yr target may signal a cheaper/junior hire; £42k floor < Ryan's £50k; 6.4yr could read as over-leveled.
ranked.apply_move: Email careers@tryspecter.com with a sharp tailored note connecting literal FA-at-scaling-startup + 100k community build to Specter's deal-sourcing community mission.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Marketer
ranked.biggest_lever: Sequoia-backed 11-person team; CEO personally reads applications. Explicit zero-to-one mandate maps to Ryan's GTM-from-zero spike.
ranked.biggest_risk: Prefers early-stage ENTERPRISE B2B growth; domain (industrial procurement/supply chain) unfamiliar; open ~3 months (possible selectivity).
ranked.apply_move: Tailored pitch to CEO leading with 'first growth hire who built a repeatable GTM playbook from zero ($4.5m presale)' + an AI-automation artifact.

ranked.title: AI Delivery Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Posted 2026-06-05 (~4 days old) = low-competition window; ~40-person team, hiring-manager read; forgiving 'no engineer required' requirements match FA profile.
ranked.biggest_risk: Core is customer delivery/implementation + compliance in regulated financial services - adjacent to but not Ryan's community spike.
ranked.apply_move: Apply now while fresh; frame ambiguity-navigation + cross-functional founder-associate execution hard.
ranked.salary_flag: Not stated; Series A London likely clears or near £50k.

ranked.title: Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Cleanly clears every requirement + all three preferreds (early-stage startup, high agency, AI-tools-to-multiply-output).
ranked.biggest_risk: 6-7 days/week in-office + 48hr in-person work trial; competes against consulting/banking profiles; Ryan adequate not spiked.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with AI-tools-multiply-output + side-projects track record; only apply if genuinely open to intense in-person.

ranked.title: GTM Associate, London
ranked.biggest_lever: Low bar (2+yr customer-facing); explicit must-have 'active AI power user for 10x productivity' is a direct Claude-Code differentiator; owns outcomes across GTM/ops/product/hiring.
ranked.biggest_risk: Wealthtech/financial-advice domain off Ryan's core; leans demo/sales-conversion; £40k floor risk.
ranked.apply_move: Frame $4.5m presale + 50k->5k lifecycle conversion as proven GTM outcomes; over-index on the AI-power-user must-have with Claude Code workflows.
ranked.salary_flag: £40-70k - low end below floor, negotiable to £70k.

ranked.title: Founding Generalist
ranked.biggest_lever: Textbook FA/generalist role (HR/commercial/ops/finance/legal/revops/investor relations) matching Minima FA; 'deploy/manage AI agents' line hooks Claude Code spike; Cambridge HQ = zero relocation friction.
ranked.biggest_risk: Weights back-office ops over community-led growth spike; carbon/decarbonisation domain unfamiliar; salary unconfirmed.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with Cambridge geography + literal FA-at-1->30 + the Claude Code operational-efficiency angle most generalists can't claim.

ranked.title: Founders Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-read sub-20 seed team; Ryan's Minima first-employee/FA story (seed->Series A, $4.5m presale, 100k community) is a near-perfect mirror; content/community maps to a creator music-tool GTM.
ranked.biggest_risk: No canonical JD or salary visible; seed budgets may sit below £50k; founders may prefer cheaper/younger or technical FA.
ranked.apply_move: Direct founder outreach on LinkedIn (Balderton-backed) leading with the FA-mirror story; reference your competitor-intel agent work given the music-creation domain.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Lead
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-read typeform (2 Forbes 30u30 founders); 4+yr seed-Series A growth match; form requires an AI workflow example - a direct Claude Code differentiator.
ranked.biggest_risk: Explicitly B2B outbound sales-pipeline ownership (cold outreach, deal closure) - Ryan has no enterprise B2B sales/closing track record; high media hype raises volume.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with $4.5m community-led presale (15x ROI) reframed as zero-to-one pipeline + the required Claude Code AI workflow example.

ranked.title: AI Operations Specialist
ranked.biggest_lever: Core need (hands-on Claude/n8n agent building, no coding required) is exactly Ryan's career-break work.
ranked.biggest_risk: ~500-person fintech recruiter/ATS first-gate that wants AI certifications + in-team deployment; self-directed projects risk keyword-filter.
ranked.apply_move: Attach a concrete AI-build portfolio link; seek a referral to jump the ATS.

ranked.title: Applied AI Strategist - Market Intelligence (Health)
ranked.biggest_lever: Explicitly credential-light, SWE-not-required, founder-read ~25-person team; 'AI-native repeatable research workflows' is almost a verbatim match for Ryan's Claude-Code competitor-intel work.
ranked.biggest_risk: Health-data domain ramp; implicit bar for synthesis that 'directly influenced roadmap' - Ryan's evidence is GTM/positioning not formal product-intel.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with the Claude-Code 'market signals -> recommendations' workflow + Discord/X community evidence; show a decision-grade memo artifact.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist
ranked.biggest_lever: Early-career framing, no hard Python gate, small founder-led 2024 team = reachable seniority + human read; good pay.
ranked.biggest_risk: TIC/industrial-inspection domain far from crypto/AI-consumer; wants enterprise post-sales/account-growth Ryan lacks.
ranked.apply_move: Frame founding-generalist + Claude-Code literacy + stakeholder skills; acknowledge domain ramp.

ranked.title: Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations
ranked.biggest_lever: Frame 50k->5k presale conversion (15x ROI) as transferable sales-enablement + activation analytics.
ranked.biggest_risk: Stale ~10-month evergreen posting at a non-AI VA-staffing firm; sales-ops/churn focus hits no spike; low band.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with quantified funnel results; treat as optional.

ranked.title: AI Operations Specialist
ranked.biggest_lever: Central ask (deploy Claude/n8n/Zapier agentic workflows into real ops) overlaps Ryan's Claude Code work.
ranked.biggest_risk: Explicit '2-5yr product/business operations/strategy/TPM' requirement + ~971-person fintech recruiter/ATS gate; titles don't keyword-match.
ranked.apply_move: Reframe FA/operator experience as business-operations; lead with concrete agentic-workflow builds.
ranked.salary_flag: Not stated; established fintech likely clears £50k.

ranked.title: Chief of Staff
ranked.biggest_lever: Direct-to-founder 300-word email (rajen@governr.ai) with 48h response promise - bypasses all ATS, the single highest-leverage channel in the batch.
ranked.biggest_risk: Same-day financial-modelling + investor-pitch + strategy at founder-level intensity may exceed evidenced finance-modelling depth; AI-governance domain doesn't pull on crypto/community spikes.
ranked.apply_move: Tight 300-word email to rajen@governr.ai leading with seed->Series A operator credibility, fundraising support, strategy docs, AI-native building.
ranked.salary_flag: Not stated; pre-seed CoS could land near/modestly above £50k + equity.

ranked.title: Founders Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Claude-Code automation + 'turn ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams' maps to the AI-workflows + strategic-projects part of JD.
ranked.biggest_risk: Front-loads EA/diary work; non-AI creative studio; possible sub-£50k + hard NW7 commute.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only if open to creative-studio chief-of-staff path; lead with AI-workflow + strategic-project ownership.
ranked.salary_flag: Not listed; creative-studio budget uncertain vs £50k.

ranked.title: Founder's Associate (Technical)
ranked.biggest_lever: Role explicitly builds internal tools + AI workflows USING CLAUDE CODE - near-exact match; 'coding not required but a plus' so 'Technical' is not a SWE gate; founder/CTO-read.
ranked.biggest_risk: Climate-tech (heat-pumps/solar) cold for Ryan; pitched at 1-3yr/£55k junior band - overqualification + domain-passion gap.
ranked.apply_move: Map Claude-Code agent-building 1:1 to the JD; lead with founder-associate track record.

ranked.title: Founding Operator (Jill Delivery)
ranked.biggest_lever: Position first-employee 1->30 + 'turn ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams' + Claude Code automation as the high-agency process-builder this seat needs.
ranked.biggest_risk: Centre of gravity is enterprise customer-success/account-portfolio ownership Ryan lacks; competes against a 10-ex-founder peer bar.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with process-builder + automation story; acknowledge it's a stretch on CS portfolio.

ranked.title: Growth Generalist
ranked.biggest_lever: Genuine generalist-growth fit; role waives B2B-experience requirement.
ranked.biggest_risk: $11B lab + remote-global + no experience bar = enormous applicant pool through recruiter/ATS; non-traditional CV likely screened before story lands.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only with a referral or standout creative artifact that jumps the recruiter queue.

ranked.title: GTM AI Operator | UK (Growth Solutions Architect)
ranked.biggest_lever: Core ask (prototype/ship autonomous AI agents with Claude Code, n8n) maps to Ryan's genuine spike - the one criterion he can out-evidence the 200+ applicants on.
ranked.biggest_risk: ATS keyword filter at a 5000+-person unicorn (missing SQL/Salesforce/RevOps/production keywords); 200+ applicants at ~1 week old.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with a concrete Claude Code agent artifact framed as production-style GTM automation.

ranked.title: Customer Success Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-read 5-person team; strong intro call + take-home where operator agency + AI fluency can offset missing CS title.
ranked.biggest_risk: No CS/account background, no logistics domain, demanding depot-field/early-start requirement Ryan has never signalled appetite for.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only if genuinely open to field/depot work.

ranked.title: Founder's Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Genuine founder-read on sub-12-person team; first-employee FA seed->Series A story fits the 'build a company' narrative.
ranked.biggest_risk: MBB/IB-flavoured pedigree bar + technical/consulting team culture + regulated TIC domain (aerospace/medtech); current need is enterprise deal-closing.
ranked.apply_move: Lead hard with 'high-growth startup operator, seed->Series A, $4.5m presale + fundraising support' to clear the non-MBB path.

ranked.title: Strategy & Operations
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-mindset + extreme-ownership + first-employee-scaling narrative answers the cultural bar; no hard technical blocker.
ranked.biggest_risk: Rewards operational/data/process rigor in enterprise logistics, not Ryan's community-GTM spike; 50-75% travel; high volume at hot YC co.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with extreme-ownership + first-employee story; apply if capacity.

ranked.title: Product Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: AI-native/Claude-Code builder identity is exactly what the JD prizes; consumer-growth lens fits 'consumer-minded builder' path.
ranked.biggest_risk: No PM/solutions-eng/TAM/CS-eng title; no evidence of scoping webhooks/OAuth/integrations - likely technical-fluency screen-out.
ranked.apply_move: Apply opportunistically via 'consumer-minded builder + AI-native operator' angle; treat as long-shot.

ranked.title: Agent Strategy Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Reframe Minima first-employee scaling + investor/C-level comms + Claude-Code building as 'strategic advisor on product, deployment, outcomes'.
ranked.biggest_risk: Hot $4.5B-valuation company at £105-140k attracts hundreds of enterprise CS/deployment applicants; no enterprise B2B delivery evidence; ATS filter.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only with a tailored deployment-outcome-led pitch; treat as low-odds.

ranked.title: AI Product Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Application asks every candidate to build an n8n workflow + screenshot - Ryan's agent fluency can produce a standout artifact.
ranked.biggest_risk: No PM title/experience; AI work is internal tooling not shipped products; 260-person $5.2bn co with ATS; Berlin-anchored vs UK-only auth.
ranked.apply_move: Only if relocating to Berlin; lead with the workflow artifact.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist
ranked.biggest_lever: AI-leverage thesis + ambiguity-comfort + enablement/ambassador programmes give a thin narrative bridge.
ranked.biggest_risk: Core requirement is enterprise B2B deployment/renewals/expansion - explicitly NOT Ryan's experience - at a $6.6B hyper-famous brand with recruiter keyword screening.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist - Europe
ranked.biggest_lever: Position Claude-Code agent-building as basic Python/API prototyping + customer/executive-facing communication.
ranked.biggest_risk: Hard technical gate (Python + API + FDE-adjacent) Ryan doesn't formally meet + massive applicant volume at a hype company.
ranked.apply_move: Deprioritise; only apply with a strong demonstrable agent-building portfolio.

ranked.biggest_lever: London-hybrid ops-team role with an AI-experimentation/vendor-evaluation slice lightly touching Claude-Code work.
ranked.biggest_risk: Despite the title, the actual work is AI-infrastructure/MLOps engineering (model hosting, orchestration, pipelines, eval frameworks) Ryan can't evidence; healthtech domain compounds the gap.
ranked.apply_move: Skip - would be screened out on technical requirements.

ranked.title: GTM, Strategy & Delivery
ranked.biggest_lever: Generalist high-ownership operator clears the 2+yr bar; founder-read likely on a 20-person team.
ranked.biggest_risk: New York in-person, no UK/remote option = work-authorisation + location near-blocker for UK-only Ryan; patent/IP legaltech domain + enterprise-POC delivery off-profile.
ranked.apply_move: Skip unless willing/able to relocate to the US (visa). Note: this is the NY GTM role, distinct from the London FA role Ryan already applied to.
